2327090.name: JETPACK BIRDIE
2327090.description:
JETPACK BIRDIE is a fast-paced shooter about jetpack flights and struggle for freedom. It fuses the fast levels of Neon White and the classic shooter gameplay of Max Payne with its bullet time and camera.

You are Birdie, a young man on the run from the most powerful gang in the city above the clouds. Cooperate with the rebel group and carve your way to a free future.

Use your jets and stay in the air as long as you want. Fly through levels, eliminating your enemies, finding secrets and mastering your skills. Face friends and foes between your flights and experience this adventure alongside Birdie.

FEATURES

  • Short, experimental game that explores the theme of freedom.

  • Enjoyable movement system that allows you to stay in the air for as long as you want.

  • Concentrated action story set in a fantastic city above the clouds.

  • Old school shooter with no covers or unnecessary pauses.

  • Soundtrack by talented Kyle Misko.
2327090.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
